title: Red Chilli Flakes Roasted Kenyan Fatty Meat Grill
description: A delicious and easy Kenyan dish featuring red chilli flakes, perfect for a lazy Sunday or a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium-high heat (around 400°F/200°C).
Season the fatty meat with salt, black pepper, and red chilli flakes.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a pan over medium heat (around 300°F/150°C).
Add the garlic, ginger, onion, and tomato to the pan and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the meat to the pan and cook for 5 minutes on each side, until browned.
Transfer the meat to the preheated binchotan grill and cook for 10-12 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While the meat is cooking, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a small pan over low heat (around 200°F/90°C).
Add the coconut milk and lemon juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Once the meat is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Serve the meat with the sauce spooned over the top and garnished with fresh cilantro.
Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
